chat_widget_desc: A floating chat button on every page of this trip: quick access to the group chat and AI assistant without opening a separate screen
chat_widget_label: Show the widget on trip pages
chat_widget_off: The widget is hidden. The chat is still available on the separate "Group chat" page.
chat_widget_on: Pinned in the bottom-right corner, opens the chat and AI assistant over any trip page
copy_trip_desc: Create your own copy of this trip with all its cities and bookings. You own the copy; Pro features and documents are not carried over.
delete_account_blocked_msg: You have an active Pro subscription. Please cancel it first under "Manage subscription" above, then try again.
delete_account_confirm: Delete your account? This cannot be undone.
delete_account_support_msg: Please contact support to delete your account
delete_confirm1: Delete the trip? This cannot be undone.
delete_confirm2: Are you sure? All trip data will be deleted.
delete_desc: Irreversible. All trip data will be deleted.
feat_budget_desc: Categories, manual expenses, custom exchange rates
leave_confirm: Leave the trip? You will stop seeing it.
leave_desc: You will stop seeing the trip. Your personal documents in it will be permanently deleted. The owner can invite you again.
leave_not_found: Error: your membership in the trip was not found
leave_owner_blocked: Transfer ownership to another participant before leaving
main_currency_hint: The budget is aggregated into this currency
plan_pro_feature_members: Pro features for all members of your trips
readonly_banner_desc: You don't have permission to change settings — only the owner and admins can. You can only leave the trip.
test_subscription_hint: Opens Stripe checkout for the test product (admin only)
tg_after_start: After pressing Start in Telegram, come back here, the panel updates automatically
tg_connect_desc: Link Telegram to get reminders about hotels, transfers and activities for this trip
tg_connected_desc: Notifications for this trip will now arrive in Telegram
tg_creating: Creating a unique link to the Triplanio bot for this trip
tg_link_error: Could not create the link. Try again later.
tg_press_below: Tap the button below to open the bot via this link and press Start
tg_section_empty_desc: Link an account to get notifications about check-ins and transfers
tg_step1_pre: In the chat that opens, press
tg_step2: Come back to this tab, the status updates automatically
title: Settings
warn_bookings_desc: E.g. no transfer between cities, or no hotel booked for some dates.
warnings_desc: Badges and banners about issues in this trip plan
